message:
🐛 Fix stale data and freshness indicator issues (#10043)

When the compliance frameworks are loading, show a Skeleton placeholder
instead of a disabled <select> with raw 'Loading...' text. This aligns
with the project's loading UX pattern (skeleton → data) and avoids
untranslated hardcoded strings. Also adds array safety guard on the
frameworks.map() call.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
